name: Greenland Technologies Holding Corp.
summary: PART I General Greenland Technologies Holding Corporation (the Company or Greenland) designs, develops, manufactures and sells components and products for the global material handling industries. Through its subsidiaries in the PRC, Greenland offers transmission products, which are key components for forklift trucks used in manufacturing and logistic applications, such as factories, workshops, warehouses, fulfilment centers, shipyards, and seaports.
